name: OVS S.p.A.
summary: OVS S.p.A. operates as a fashion retailer in Italy and Internationally. The company operates through OVS and UPIM segments. Its products include men's wear, women's wear, children's wear, and infant's clothing; table and kitchen ware; accessories to furnishings; toys; perfumes; make-up products; professional make-up accessories; and bath and skincare products. The company offers its products under the OVS, OVS KIDS, Upim, Blukids, Shaka Innovative Beauty, and CROFF brands. As of January 31, 2020, it operated a network of 1,770 stores, including 775 DOS, 887 affiliated stores, and 108 administered stores. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Mestre, Italy.
